prompt: Create a realistic waist-up indoor portrait photo of a young adult woman of mixed Japanese and Middle Eastern appearance, with long dark brown-black hair parted slightly off center and falling naturally over her shoulders. She wears a fitted black ribbed knit V-neck top, a delicate gold necklace with a tiny pendant, and small gold hoop earrings. Pose her seated or standing close to the camera, shoulders angled slightly, in a warm upscale interior with a dark brown marble wall with white veining on the left, a cream wall and dark doorframe on the right, and soft warm ambient lighting. Use a realistic smartphone-photo look, natural skin tones, shallow depth of field, vertical portrait framing cropped around the chest and top of head. Cover the entire face area with one large opaque square censor block in a muted brown skin-tone gradient, centered over the face from forehead to chin, while leaving the hair, ears, neck, jewelry, and clothing visible. No text, no watermark, no extra people.
